title: Delicious Croatian Datterini Tomato Toast
description: A traditional Croatian dish featuring datterini tomatoes and cheese, perfect for a snack or light lunch, and jain-friendly as it does not contain any animal products except for cheese which can be substituted with a jain-friendly alternative
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Arrange the baguette slices on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the olive oil over the baguette slices.
Sprinkle the salt and black pepper over the baguette slices.
Bake the baguette slices in the oven for 10 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Remove the baguette slices from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes.
Top each baguette slice with a halved datterini tomato.
Drizzle the balsamic vinegar over the datterini tomatoes.
Sprinkle the chopped fresh basil over the datterini tomatoes.
Top each baguette slice with a slice of vegan mozzarella cheese.
